src: The Emerging Solutions Toolbox is a collection of solutions created by Snowflake's Solution Innovation Team (SIT) that consists of demos, helpers, and frameworks to help you get the most out of Snowflake.
ja: Emerging Solutions Toolboxは、Snowflakeを最大限に活用するためにSnowflakeのSolution Innovation Team (SIT)が作成したデモ・ヘルパー・フレームワークのソリューションコレクション
